{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032204351787344EBE7B22E86BEA56"}"},"total":145},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7416339817071543065","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"故事流畅，前期非常有带入感，后期也还行，弟弟八岁的性子虽然有点傻，但是符合人设年龄。伏笔埋得好，希望后面有好的结局。期待[飞吻]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1726755451,"group_id":"7412679765724761113","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"为了表达对这个世界的认知；为了纪念回不去的过去……","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5ON95/a2jKCUDhVhlIJTya03IDpswnF3CdDu/7A+W7m","gender":1,"is_cancelled":true,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"4130232168889485","user_name":"用户41302321"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4130232168889485","user_relation":{"can_follow":false,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7412679765724761113","book_info":{"abstract":"前世，父母偏爱弟弟，让李昱感受不到爱，他想尽办法讨好家人仍不得，却依然在危机四伏的废土世界守护家人十年，为人族默默奉献。
最后竟被诬陷成叛徒，被他守护的人类审判，父母、弟弟、至爱冷漠的看着他被斩首示众。
重生之后，李昱决定抛弃讨好所有人，只为自己而活，独自在废土升级。
谁知偏爱弟弟的父母，竟然一反常态，竟接二连三的主动找上门来。
人族高层亲自将勋章送上，只求他拯救世界。
可是，迟来的情深比草贱。
这一世，他绝不回头！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/9ad8f8bfec50e4517e902fc296bc24d7~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"月岂","author_id":"","book_id":"7412679765724761113","book_name":"我在末世独自升级","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302028","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":869,"name":"废土","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=869&name=废土&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7414202165754858520","read_count":"274","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1180181"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"5.3","serial_count":"547","tags":"科幻末世,系统,重生,末世,囤物资,废土","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/9ad8f8bfec50e4517e902fc296bc24d7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779309317&x-signature=lNo0w6AZ6u%2B57Z6323Sls2hNjOE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"120"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032204351787344EBE7B22E86BEA56"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":17712,"re
